name: billbook-app
description: BillBook - Electron application combining frontend and backend

scripts.install-all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
scripts.dev: npm run build-backend && npm run dev:electron
scripts.build-frontend: cd frontend && npm install && npx vite build
scripts.build-backend: cd backend && npm install && npx tsc
scripts.install-playwright-browsers: cd backend && npx playwright install chromium --with-deps || echo 'Playwright browsers installation completed'
scripts.download-windows-browsers: node download-windows-browsers.js || echo 'Windows browser download attempted'
scripts.prepare-backend-dist: cd backend && npm install && npm run build && npm install --omit=dev && test -d node_modules && (cd .. && rm -rf backend-deps && cp -r backend/node_modules backend-deps && echo 'node_modules copied to backend-deps') || (echo 'ERROR: node_modules missing!' && exit 1)
scripts.verify-backend-deps: test -d backend/node_modules/express && echo '✓ Express found' || echo '✗ Express NOT found'
scripts.verify-frontend-dist: test -f frontend/dist/index.html && echo '✓ Frontend dist found' || (echo '✗ Frontend dist NOT found! Run npm run build-frontend first.' && exit 1)
scripts.build: npm run build-frontend && npm run verify-frontend-dist && npm run install-playwright-browsers && npm run copy-playwright-browsers && npm run prepare-backend-dist && npm run verify-backend-deps && electron-builder && npm run cleanup-backend-deps && npm run cleanup-playwright-browsers
scripts.build:mac: npm run build-frontend && npm run verify-frontend-dist && npm run install-playwright-browsers && npm run copy-playwright-browsers && npm run prepare-backend-dist && npm run verify-backend-deps && electron-builder --mac && npm run cleanup-backend-deps && npm run cleanup-playwright-browsers
scripts.build:win: npm run build-frontend && npm run verify-frontend-dist && npm run install-playwright-browsers && npm run download-windows-browsers && npm run copy-playwright-browsers && npm run prepare-backend-dist && npm run verify-backend-deps && electron-builder --win && npm run cleanup-backend-deps && npm run cleanup-playwright-browsers
scripts.build:linux: npm run build-frontend && npm run verify-frontend-dist && npm run install-playwright-browsers && npm run copy-playwright-browsers && npm run prepare-backend-dist && npm run verify-backend-deps && electron-builder --linux && npm run cleanup-backend-deps && npm run cleanup-playwright-browsers
